verdict.label: GREEN_LIVE_WINDOW_POSTGAME_DEFERRED
verdict.reason: One-paragraph factual verdict reason derived from the evidence; see docs/mm-live-canary-evidence.md for the controlled label semantics. This template defaults to a live-window-green/postgame-deferred run; change the verdict and the proof levels together if the run differs.

capabilities.notes: Fill from target-decision evidence; name both teams with home/away roles.

capabilities.capability: Fresh clone/release install, build, and smoke gates
Non-interactive wallet auth and balance sufficiency

capabilities.notes: Fill from allowance evidence; no unlimited approvals.

capabilities.capability: Doctor/quote/dry-run loop on the intended target only
capabilities.notes: Dry-run produced quote intents with no writes, so this is synthetic-only by nature.

capabilities.capability: Live commitments posted on the intended target
capabilities.notes: proven_live when the MM posted live public commitments during the window. If no commitments posted, use a different verdict.

capabilities.capability: Live fill against a posted commitment
capabilities.notes: proven_live for an organic or controlled live fill on a live-posted commitment. If quotes drew no fill, switch the verdict to AMBER_QUOTED_NO_FILL and set this to deferred or failed.

capabilities.capability: Fill detection sourced canonically from own-state SSE
capabilities.notes: proven_live when telemetry shows fill source own-state-stream and no canonical legacy fill sources.

capabilities.capability: Public/API live exposure drained to zero at end of run
capabilities.notes: Must be proven_live in every published canary; mirror the zeroExposure block.
A read-only/dry-run cold-start probe is synthetic-only; use proven_live only when a process-level cursor resume is actually proven.

capabilities.capability: Contest scored against a verified external final score
capabilities.notes: deferred when the artifact is cut before the game is final; set to proven_live (with evidence) and switch the verdict to FULL_GREEN once postgame completes.

capabilities.capability: Speculation settled to the winning side
capabilities.notes: deferred when the artifact is cut before the game is final.

capabilities.capability: Winning positions claimed or no-op proven via empty dry-runs
capabilities.notes: deferred when the artifact is cut before the game is final. A no-op proof (empty claim-all dry-run for every controlled wallet) counts as proven_live.

capabilities.capability: Total controlled spend and gas within the run cap
capabilities.notes: Fill from budget/receipt evidence; state the cap and observed totals.

transactions.purpose: Replace with the actual purpose; add one entry per transaction the run relies on and delete unused skeleton entries.
Replace with the actual purpose; successful postgame categories (score-request, score-callback, settle, claim) must be absent when the verdict defers postgame.
